TCode.name: TCode
TCode.x-description: Replaces StudyID. Derived using SIDCodes mapping.

TumourTracking.name: TumourTracking
TumourTracking.description: Tumour- and specimen-level pathology tracking records. Each item corresponds to a tissue block/slide linked to a tumour and pathology report.
TumourTracking.x-description: Source: TumourTracking table in Pathology DB.

Material.name: Material
Material.description: Type of material received from hospital

LabNo.name: LabNo
LabNo.description: Laboratory accession number uniquely identifying a tissue block or slide.

LATERALITY.name: LATERALITY
LATERALITY.description: Breast laterality from which the specimen originated.

TUMOUR_COUNT.name: TUMOUR_COUNT
TUMOUR_COUNT.description: Sequential tumour identifier within a participant (used to distinguish multiple tumours recorded for the same participant; not a biological ordering).
TUMOUR_COUNT.x-description: Sequentially coded 1..N within participant; dataset may contain multiple records per participant when multiple tumours are recorded.

REPORT_COUNT.name: REPORT_COUNT
REPORT_COUNT.description: Sequential identifier for pathology reports within a participant. Multiple tumours may relate to the same report.

CoreBiopsy_Flag.name: CoreBiopsy_Flag
CoreBiopsy_Flag.description: Indicator that the specimen originates from a core needle biopsy.
CoreBiopsy_Flag.x-description:
Derived from TumourTracking.BlockComments using regex:
^(?!.*(?i:with\s+cores?|core.*missing|core.*rec['’]?d\s+earlier))(?=.*(?i:core)).*$
Rule: BlockComments must contain 'core' (case-insensitive), but excludes text implying the core is elsewhere ('with core' / 'with cores'), missing ('core...missing'), or previously received ('core...rec'd earlier' / 'core...recd earlier').

MegaBlock_Flag.name: MegaBlock_Flag
MegaBlock_Flag.description: Indicator that the specimen is a large-format ('mega') histology block.
MegaBlock_Flag.x-description: Derived from TumourTracking.BlockComments: set to TRUE if BlockComments contains substring 'mega' (case-insensitive), else FALSE.

LymphNodes_Flag.name: LymphNodes_Flag
LymphNodes_Flag.description: Indicator that the specimen corresponds to lymph node tissue (e.g., axillary sampling/clearance). Does not indicate nodal involvement.
LymphNodes_Flag.x-description: Derived from TumourTracking.BlockComments: set to TRUE if BlockComments contains any of the following terms (case-insensitive): 'node', 'nodes', 'axillary clearance', 'axillary sample'; else FALSE.

LabTracking.name: LabTracking
LabTracking.description: Laboratory processing and digitisation metadata for the specimen.
LabTracking.x-description: Source: LabTracking table; linked by LabNo.

LabSampleType.name: LabSampleType
LabSampleType.description: Histological preparation type of the laboratory specimen.

Scan.name: Scan
Scan.description: Status of digital slide scanning for the first digitisation round.
Scan.x-description: As recorded in the source system; originally described as completeness of 'Round1' scanned data.

TMAs.name: TMAs
TMAs.description: Tissue Microarray (TMA) mapping records describing array identifiers and grid positions of sampled tissue cores.
TMAs.x-description: Source: TMAMapping table; linked by LabNo.

ArrayNo.name: ArrayNo
ArrayNo.description: Short identifier distinguishing arrays within a TMA series (as recorded in the source system).

ArraySister.name: ArraySister
ArraySister.description: Identifier indicating a paired/replicate ('sister') TMA block constructed from the same source material.

ArraySection.name: ArraySection
ArraySection.description: Section number cut from the TMA block (as recorded in the source system).

XAxis.name: XAxis
XAxis.description: Column coordinate of the core position within the TMA grid.

YAxis.name: YAxis
YAxis.description: Row coordinate of the core position within the TMA grid.

TMACoreID.name: TMACoreID
TMACoreID.description: Identifier of the individual tissue core placed at the specified TMA grid coordinate (may include orientation/control labels).
